seed_instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting.
org_constraint: The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs.
new_constraint: The email must contain at least 15 sentences, with each paragraph consisting of no more than 4 sentences.
instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs. The email must contain at least 15 sentences, with each paragraph consisting of no more than 4 sentences.
response:
Subject: Resignation - [Your Name]

I am writing to formally inform you of my decision to resign from my position at this company, effective two weeks from today. After much deliberation and careful consideration of my career goals, I have determined that it is time for me to pursue a new opportunity that aligns better with my long-term aspirations. Please accept this email as my official notice of resignation, and I want to express my deepest gratitude for the professional growth and guidance you have provided me during my tenure here. This was not an easy decision to make, as I truly value the support and mentorship I have received from our entire team over the past few years.

The time has come for me to seek fresh challenges that will allow me to develop different skills and explore new areas within my industry. While leaving such a wonderful organization is difficult, I believe that taking this next step is necessary for my personal and professional evolution at this stage in my life. I am committed to ensuring a smooth transition before my departure by completing all my pending tasks and documenting my current processes thoroughly. I would be happy to assist in training a replacement or helping to onboard any new team members who might join to take over my responsibilities.

Please let me know if there are any specific procedures I need to follow regarding the return of company property or the finalization of my exit paperwork. I wish you and the entire team nothing but continued success and prosperity as we move forward without my contributions. It has been a privilege to work alongside such dedicated and talented individuals under your leadership during my time here. Thank you once again for everything, and I hope we can stay in touch professionally in the future.<|im_end|>
